meaning: n.意大利面制品,意大利面食(包括通心粉及面条等)
examples: She dug into her bowl of pasta.
I'm not overly fond of pasta.
They stock every imaginable type of pasta.
Like pasta in Italy, each community adds its own unique flavour to the world of hummus.
And following in the tradition of Tuscan cuisine, there is no pasta on the menu.
